description: Style Noteestelle jewellery captures femininity with their elegant designs which complement both ethnic and western wear. estelle is one of the brand leaders creating designer costume jewellery in India. They create beautiful pieces for stylish and elegant woman in a wide range of designs that are international in style embodying a spirit of aspiration and confidence.Warranty: 1 yearProduct DetailsConch shaped earring in gold plated floral design with imported crystal/CZ insetEarring post made of hypoallergenic surgical steelearrings have a push back closureMaterial and carePewter, plated with 24 carat goldClean with cotton cloth when requiredSizeLength of earrings: 1.25 cm
